title: Eat Smart, Not Less: The Practical Indian Diet Guide for Fat Loss Without Starving
excerpt: Fat loss on an Indian diet isn't about starvation — it's about fixing your plate structure. A practical guide to calorie deficit, portion control, and protein balance using everyday Indian foods.
author: Priya Sharma

title: How Many Calories Are in a Typical Indian Meal? A Complete Breakdown
excerpt: From butter chicken to dal makhani — we've calorie-counted 40+ popular Indian dishes so you don't have to guess at every meal.
author: Nutrition Tracker Team

title: No Gym? No Excuses: The Ultimate Home Workout Plan for Indians
excerpt: A structured, no-equipment home workout plan built for Indian lifestyles — weekly schedule, exercise breakdowns, and calorie targets that actually work without a gym.
author: Rohan Mehta

title: The Number on the Scale Is Lying to You
excerpt: BMI was built for European bodies, not Indian ones. Learn why ICMR uses lower thresholds, what TOFI syndrome means for South Asians, and the five metrics that actually predict your health risk.
author: Dr. Ananya Rao

title: 10 High-Protein Indian Breakfasts Under 400 Calories
excerpt: Besan chilla, paneer bhurji, moong dal chilla — 10 practical high-protein Indian breakfast options with recipes that keep you full until lunch without heavy calories.
author: Priya Sharma

title: Surya Namaskar for Weight Loss: Does It Really Burn Enough Calories?
excerpt: Surya Namaskar can burn real calories — but only if you do it right. Here's the actual calorie math, how it compares to jogging, and the volume and pace needed to see fat loss results.
author: Kavitha Nair

title: South Indian vs North Indian Diet: Which One Is Actually Healthier?
excerpt: Rice vs roti, fermented vs fried, lighter vs denser — a real macronutrient breakdown of both diets with an honest verdict on which works better for weight and metabolic health.
author: Nutrition Tracker Team

title: Intermittent Fasting for Indians: How to Make It Work with Real Meal Timings and Daily Life
excerpt: Late dinners, chai breaks, festival eating — standard IF protocols don't fit Indian life. Here's how to adapt 12:12, 14:10, and 16:8 fasting to your actual routine without quitting.
author: Dr. Ananya Rao

title: TDEE for Indians: Why Your Daily Routine Matters More Than Generic Calorie Calculators
excerpt: An office worker in Bangalore, a homemaker in Chennai, and a construction worker in Delhi burn vastly different calories. Here's how to calculate your real TDEE using India-specific activity levels.
author: Priya Sharma

title: Protein Power: The Vegetarian Indian's Complete Guide to 100g a Day
excerpt: Most Indian vegetarians eat only 30–45g of protein daily. This guide shows how to hit 100g using dal, paneer, soy chunks, sattu, and moong — no supplements, no imported products.
author: Rohan Mehta

title: Street Smart: The Guilt-Free Guide to Your Favourite Indian Street Food
excerpt: Baked samosas, chia pani puri, millet bhel — science-backed ingredient swaps that slash street food calories by 30–50% while keeping every bit of the flavour and texture intact.
author: Nutrition Tracker Team
